title: AAD IIT Roorkee Audiologist & Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP)/ Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
org: Anushruti Academy for the Deaf, IIT Roorkee
shortInfo: Anushruti Academy for the Deaf, IIT Roorkee (AAD IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026: Anushruti Academy for the Deaf, IIT Roorkee has released the official notification for 1 Audiologist & Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP)/ Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

basic_details.job_title: AAD IIT Roorkee Audiologist & Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP)/ Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Anushruti Academy for the Deaf, IIT Roorkee
basic_details.short_information: Anushruti Academy for the Deaf, IIT Roorkee (AAD IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026: Anushruti Academy for the Deaf, IIT Roorkee has released the official notification for 1 Audiologist & Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP)/ Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Degree course in Speech & Audiology (BASLP) / Diploma in Hearing, Language & Speech (DHLS)

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.iitr.ac.in/anushruti.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AAD IIT Roorkee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the AAD IIT Roorkee Audiologist & Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP)/ Assistant posts is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Audiologist & Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP)/ Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Audiologist & Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP)/ Assistant post at Anushruti Academy for the Deaf, IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree course in Speech & Audiology (BASLP) or a Diploma in Hearing, Language & Speech (DHLS) to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What are the selection methods for the AAD IIT Roorkee recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Anushruti Academy for the Deaf, IIT Roorkee: www.iitr.ac.in/anushruti.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for more information is www.iitr.ac.in/anushruti.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Full Time.
